name: Katarina

resource.context_notes: Champion does not use mana/energy as a standard regenerating resource for ability costs.

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Voracity
passive.description_source: Innate: Scoring a champion  takedown within a short time of damaging them  reduces the current cooldowns of  Katarina's  abilities.

effects.description: Innate: Scoring a champion takedown within 3 seconds of damaging them will reduce the current cooldowns of Katarina's abilities by 15 seconds.

Innate - Sinister Steel: Whenever Katarina retrieves a Dagger, she slashes around herself to deal 68 : 275 (based on level) (+ 60% bonus AD) (+ 70% / 80% / 90% / 100% (based on level) AP) magic damage to nearby enemies, apply on-hit effects to enemy champions hit, and reduce Shunpo's current cooldown by 78% / 84% / 90% / 96% (based on level) of its total cooldown.
Daggers grant sight of their radius and will disappear after being on the ground for 4 seconds.

passive.description: Innate: Scoring a champion takedown within 3 seconds of damaging them will reduce the current cooldowns of Katarina's abilities by 15 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Voracity's cooldown reduction will still take effect even after Katarina dies.

basic_ability_1.name: Bouncing Blade
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Katarina throws a Dagger at the target enemy that can bounce to up to two additional nearby enemies, dealing magic damage.

effects.context_notes: Active: Katarina throws a Dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage and can bounce to up to two additional visible nearby enemies.

effects.description: The Dagger lands 1.023 seconds after striking the first target, about 350 units opposite from their position when it struck them.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Katarina throws a Dagger at the target enemy that deals magic damage and can bounce to up to two additional visible nearby enemies.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Bouncing Blade will not be destroyed in-flight if the target dies before reaching them but it will on clones that expire.

basic_ability_2.name: Preparation
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Katarina briefly gains  ghosting and a burst of  movement speed, tossing a Dagger into the air directly above herself.

effects.context_notes: Active: Katarina tosses a Dagger into the air above her current location and gains bonus movement speed that decays until it lands after 1.25 seconds, becoming ghosted for the same duration.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Katarina tosses a Dagger into the air above her current location and gains bonus movement speed that decays until it lands after 1.25 seconds, becoming ghosted for the same duration.

basic_ability_3.name: Shunpo

effects.context_notes: Active: Katarina blinks to a target location near the unit or Dagger closest to the cursor, dealing magic damage to the nearest enemy in range and applying on-hit effects.

effects.description: Katarina prioritizes blinking to the location near Daggers, then enemy champions, then enemy non-champions, and then any other unit.
Shunpo resets Katarina's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Katarina blinks to a target location near the unit or Dagger closest to the cursor, dealing magic damage to the nearest enemy in range and applying on-hit effects.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Shunpo's effects occur before the cast time.
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active: Katarina blinks to a target location near the unit or Dagger closest to the cursor, dealing magic damage to the nearest enemy in range and applying on-hit effects.

ultimate.name: Death Lotus

effects.context_notes: Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 nearby enemy champions.
Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 nearby enemy champions.
Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 nearby enemy champions.
Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 nearby enemy champions.
Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 nearby enemy champions.

effects.description: An enemy champion within 500 units is required to cast this ability. The target does not have to be visible to be hit by this ability.

ultimate.description: Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 of the closest nearby enemy champions, revealing herself in the process.Each dagger deals physical damage and magic damage, applies on-hit effects, with on-hit damage reduced in effectiveness, triggers on-attack effects, and inflicts Grievous Wounds on the target for 3 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): An alternate form of writing the formula for the bonus AD ratio (and which the game data is using internally) is (16% × (1 + 312.
ultimate.description_source: Active: Katarina channels for up to 2.5 seconds, rapidly throwing a dagger every 0.166 seconds to up to 3 of the closest nearby enemy champions, revealing herself in the process.Each dagger deals physical damage and magic damage, applies on-hit effects, with on-hit damage reduced in effectiveness, triggers on-attack effects, and inflicts Grievous Wounds on the target for 3 seconds.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
